name: Resume James Guevara Gamboa

projects.title: Escazu Village
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Escazú Village, a mixed-use destination in Escazú where retail, dining and community life come together. Features a hero showcase, business directory, residential and talent sections, parking billing and contact lead forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: C3 Cariari Corporate Center
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for C3 Cariari Corporate Center, a corporate hub connecting businesses with premium services. Features a hero showcase, business directory, impact and talent sections, blog, parking billing and contact lead forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Plaza Tempo
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Plaza Tempo, a mixed-use destination connecting work, dining, retail and community life. Features a hero carousel, business directory, events, location with Google Maps and contact lead forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Aleste
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Aleste, a walkable mixed-use development built around live, work and enjoy. Features a hero showcase, business directory, uses and impact sections, blog, parking billing and contact lead forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Novus ERP
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Novus ERP by Codisa, showcasing ERP solutions that optimize processes and support business growth. Features a hero carousel, solutions and about sections, blog, contact forms and an integrated brand video. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Portafolio Inmobiliario
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Portafolio Inmobiliario, Costa Rica's leading real estate developer. Features a hero carousel with strategic reports, projects and talent sections, KPI highlights, social links and contact forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Avenida Escazu
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Avenida Escazú, Costa Rica's first urban mixed-use avenue focused on well-being and sustainable mobility. Features a hero showcase, business directory, impact and talent sections, parking billing and contact lead forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: Savia
projects.description: Developed the bilingual website for Savia City of Life, a sustainable urban development where city and nature intertwine. Features a hero carousel, impact and talent sections, blog and contact forms. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Strapi and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: JamesXP
projects.description: Developed JamesXP, an independent gaming news platform with an esports and editorial layout — Steam headlines, RAWG discovery rails, and live catalog data. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Lenis, and GSAP animations.

projects.title: PolkaCR
projects.description: Built the PolkaCR ecommerce for a Costa Rican art and apparel brand using Shopify — product catalog, collections, cart, checkout, and a conversion-focused storefront.

projects.description: Developed an ecommerce for Contraluz business using Shopify with payment gateways, cart tracking plugins, inventory management and conversion optimization

projects.title: Steam Women
projects.description: Developed the Steam Women platform to support and empower women in Costa Rica. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, animations with Lenis and GSAP, Django backend and GraphQL

services.title: Web Design
services.description: I build and optimize your online presence. A website is the digital entry point into your business and a powerful revenue channel.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Development of responsive websites using modern frameworks such as React and Next.js.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: Creating user-friendly interfaces that provide an enjoyable user experience.

services.title: CMS Development
services.description: Expertise in building and customizing websites using CMS platforms like Strapi, Shopify, Drupal, and WordPress with custom themes and plugins.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Development of robust backend systems and APIs using modern technologies like Node.js, Python, Express, GraphQL, and databases such as MySQL and MongoDB.

aboutpara: I’m a Frontend Developer with experience in frontend development, web design, and WordPress. I’ve helped businesses build modern web experiences with technologies like React, Next.js, and Shopify.

resume.description: I'm James Guevara Gamboa, a web developer specializing in frontend development and web design. I hold a Technician degree in Web Design and Development from CETAV and have worked on projects like Audiophile (e-commerce) and Travel Haven (Airbnb clone). My expertise includes JavaScript, React, Next.js, SEO optimization, and WordPress customization. I'm passionate about crafting effective and engaging digital solutions.
